children.heading: Trust fund required
children.label: a Trust fund required
children.text: A State or unit of local government shall establish a trust fund in which to deposit amounts received under this part.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Each amount received under this part (including interest on such amount) shall be expended before the date on which the grant period expires.

children.heading: Repayment
children.label: 2 Repayment
children.text: A State or unit of local government that fails to expend an entire amount (including interest on such amount) as required by paragraph (1) shall repay the unexpended portion to the Attorney General not later than 3 months after the date on which the grant period expires.

children.heading: Reduction of future amounts
children.label: 3 Reduction of future amounts
children.text: If a State or unit of local government fails to comply with paragraphs (1) and (2), the Attorney General shall reduce amounts to be provided to that State or unit of local government accordingly.

children.heading: Repaid amounts
children.label: c Repaid amounts
children.text: Amounts received as repayments under this section shall be subject to as if such amounts had not been granted and repaid. Such amounts shall be deposited in the Treasury in a dedicated fund for use by the Attorney General to carry out this part. Such funds are hereby made available to carry out this part.section 10108 of this title
